context: Tests whether the agent correctly applies the ≥50 conversions threshold before declaring an A/B test winner, advises against changing campaigns still in the learning phase (first 48-72 hours), and uses the frequency < 2.5 and spending < 30% of budget criteria for scaling decisions.

checklist.name: Correct output file path
checklist.description: Report is written to ads-reports/2026-05-12.md (matching ads-reports/<YYYY-MM-DD>.md pattern)

checklist.name: Statistical significance threshold applied
checklist.description: Report explicitly states that the total conversions per variant (7-9 conversions each) are insufficient to declare a winner, referencing a minimum threshold of ≥50 conversions per ad set (or equivalent) before concluding the test

checklist.name: Hook A identified as current leader
checklist.description: Report identifies Hook A as the current leading variant based on its metrics (highest CTR 1.30%, lowest CPC $1.12, highest ROAS 3.10x, lowest CPA $35.56)

checklist.name: Frequency check for scale readiness
checklist.description: Report mentions frequency for the leading variant (1.19-1.21) as evidence of available headroom before scale, or references a frequency threshold (< 2.5) as a scale criterion

checklist.name: Do not pause mid-test recommendation
checklist.description: Report recommends continuing the test rather than pausing variants prematurely, given insufficient conversion data

checklist.name: Scale conditions stated
checklist.description: Report states specific conditions under which scaling would be appropriate — including a conversion count threshold (≥50), a frequency ceiling, or a budget utilization check

checklist.name: Learning phase caveat
checklist.description: Report references the need to avoid making changes to campaigns during the learning/ramp period, or notes that the test needs more time to exit the learning phase

checklist.name: Prioritized recommendations (P0/P1/P2)
checklist.description: Report includes recommendations organized by priority (P0 — no major changes yet; P1 — monitor; P2 — brief new hook variants, or equivalent)

checklist.name: Headline metrics table
checklist.description: Report includes a table or section with the key metrics for all three ad variants (CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS, conversions)

checklist.name: Scaling decision section
checklist.description: Report includes a dedicated scaling decision section with a clear yes/no verdict and supporting numbers
